text: add color to aim data model

status.comment: Added optional nullable hex `color` field to AimSchema (shared/types.ts). Persists through the existing update path (input is AimSchema.partial(), handler spreads {...existingAim, ...input.aim}). A color picker + Clear button added to AimEditModal (sends null to clear). shared/dist rebuilt; backend+frontend typecheck clean; 2 regression tests added.
